name: originforge
description: A 9-agent originality & authenticity studio. Detects AI-likelihood and plagiarism the way market engines do (GPTZero, Originality.ai, Copyleaks, Turnitin, Winston), explains exactly what would get flagged and why, then revises the user's OWN or AI-assisted drafts into genuinely human, original writing and re-scans for residual risk. Bilingual RO/EN. Honest by design: no 'guaranteed undetectable', and it refuses to disguise copied or third-party content as original.
